---
title: Ongoing Projects
page-layout: full
---

## GitHub Organization Projects

This page provides a comprehensive index of ongoing research projects in the McPherson Lab. Our projects are organized through our [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/McPhersonLab) where we collaborate on research initiatives related to conferences, journal publications, and grant applications.

### Quick Overview

We maintain **50+ active research projects** across multiple domains including:

- **Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR)**: Genomic and clinical investigations of drug-resistant pathogens
- **Gut Microbiome**: Metagenomic and metabolomic analyses of human gut microbiota
- **Treatment Optimization**: Evidence-based approaches to infectious disease management
- **Artificial Intelligence**: Machine learning applications in microbiology and medicine
- **Biophysics & Pharmacology**: Molecular mechanisms and drug discovery
- **Health Economics**: Cost-effectiveness and ROI analyses
- **Environmental Health**: Climate change impacts on infectious diseases

All projects use standardized workflows, documentation templates, and CRediT contributor roles for transparent collaboration.

### Project Repository Structure

Our research projects are categorized and tracked through GitHub repositories and project boards:

- **[Template Project Repository](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/template)**: Starting template for new research projects
- **[CRediT (Contributor Roles Taxonomy)](https://credit.niso.org/)**: Standard for identifying contributions to research outputs
- **Conference Abstracts**: Research and abstracts for upcoming conferences
- **Manuscripts in Preparation**: Manuscripts in preparation for journal submissions
- **Grant Projects**: Grant proposals and collaborative research initiatives
- **Methods Development**: Novel computational and analytical methods
- **Data Analysis**: Ongoing data analysis and visualization projects

### How to Connect Projects

Each conference and call for papers entry in our [Research page](index.qmd) can be linked to:

1. **GitHub Repository**: A specific repository containing project code, data, and documentation
2. **GitHub Project Board**: A project board tracking tasks and milestones
3. **GitHub Issues**: Specific issues for abstract submissions, paper drafts, or collaborative work

::: {#fig-project-workflow .center}
![](flowchart.jpeg){width=70%}

**Project Workflow and Integration.** This diagram illustrates how research projects flow from initial concepts through GitHub repositories, conference presentations, and journal submissions. Projects are linked to specific calls for papers and conferences, with GitHub issues and project boards tracking progress at each stage.
:::
### Current Active Projects

Visit our [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/McPhersonLab):

::: {#active-projects-table-wrapper}
| Project (Link) | Question | Target Conference | Call for Paper | Big Name Journal |
|:---------------|:---------|:--------------|:----------------|:-----------------|
| [ai-forecast-pharmacology](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-forecast-pharmacology) | AI-driven pharmacological predictions | [IUPHAR Annual](https://www.iuphar.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[British Journal of Pharmacology](https://bpspubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/hub/call-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: May 01, 2026</em> | Nature Reviews Drug Discovery |
| [EarthEpi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/EarthEpi) | Environmental epidemiology and climate-health relationships | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Microbiology/Nature Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/bagaffbjja)**<br><em>Deadline: June 01, 2026</em> | BMC Medicine |
| [StormPath](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/StormPath) | Storm and weather impacts on infectious disease dynamics | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Microbiology/Nature Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/bagaffbjja)**<br><em>Deadline: June 01, 2026</em> | BMC Medicine |
| [mgx-abx-healthy](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-abx-healthy) | Antibiotic effects on healthy gut microbiome | [BSAC and GARDP Antimicrobial Chemotherapy Conference](https://acc-conference.com/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/ihcfhcieic)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | Nature Communications |
| [mgx-clostridioides-difficile](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-clostridioides-difficile) | Metagenomic analysis of C. difficile | [Houston *C diff* & Microbiome Conference](https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Genomic Medicine](https://www.nature.com/collections/iaadjjbbea)**<br><em>Deadline: March 28, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [mgx-mbx-abx-cdi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-abx-cdi) | Metagenomic and metabolomic determinants of CDI | [Houston *C diff* & Microbiome Conference](https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Personalized Medicine](https://link.springer.com/collections/idddeddhgf)**<br><em>Deadline: August 05, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [amr-acinetobacter-baumannii](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-acinetobacter-baumannii) | Carbapenem-resistant *A. baumannii* | [IMARI Annual](https://imari.org)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg)**<br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [amr-enterococcus-faecium](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-enterococcus-faecium) | VRE genomics and resistance | [TMC AMR](https://www.tmc.edu/events/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg)**<br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026</em> | Journal of Antimicrobial Chemotherapy |
| [amr-klebsiella-pneumoniae](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-klebsiella-pneumoniae) | Carbapenem-resistant *K. pneumoniae* | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/); [ESCMID Annual](https://www.escmid.org/congress-events/escmid-global/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg)**<br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [ai-amr](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-amr) | AI methods for antimicrobial resistance prediction | [IMARI Annual](https://imari.org)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[ACS Infectious Diseases](https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-artificial-intelligence-for-next-generation-anti-infective-discovery)**<br><em>Deadline: July 31, 2026</em> | Nature Machine Intelligence |
| [MicroSCOPE](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/MicroSCOPE) | Microbial speciation from colony observation and prediction | [ASM Microbe](https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/eecajaidbe)**<br><em>Deadline: July 07, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [ai-forecast-influenza](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-forecast-influenza) | AI forecasting of influenza dynamics | [ASV Annual](https://www.asv.org/annual-meeting)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Digital Medicine/npj Digital Public Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/jaibcfdhef)**<br><em>Deadline: May 15, 2026</em> | The Lancet Infectious Diseases |
| [ai-microbiome-transmission](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-microbiome-transmission) | AI modeling of microbiome transmission | [ASM Microbe](https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Digital Medicine/npj Digital Public Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/jaibcfdhef)**<br><em>Deadline: May 15, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [MicrobiomeHUES](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/MicrobiomeHUES) | Hierarchical Unified Ecological Spectrum of the human microbiome | [ASM Microbe](https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Microbiology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddbhjfadca)**<br><em>Deadline: May 20, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [mgx-mbx-glp-1](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-glp-1) | GLP-1 agonists and gut microbiome interactions | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Biofilms and Microbiomes](https://www.nature.com/collections/ihecbjhhdd)**<br><em>Deadline: May 20, 2026</em> | Nature Medicine |
| [ai-structural-biology](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-structural-biology) | Artificial intelligence methodology in structural biology | [Biophysical Society Annual](https://www.biophysics.org/upcoming-annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Communications/Nature Structural & Molecular Biology](https://www.nature.com/collections/jbdjhghacg)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | Nature Methods |
| [amr-pseudomonas-aeruginosa](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-pseudomonas-aeruginosa) | Multidrug-resistant *P. aeruginosa* | [North American Cystic Fibrosis (CF) Conference](https://www.nacfconference.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/jhbbbdafac)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [mgx-immunol-regulatory-t-cells](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-immunol-regulatory-t-cells) | Microbiome-immune regulatory T cell interactions | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/ihcfhcieic)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | Nature Immunology |
| [tx-cap](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-cap) | Treatment of community-acquired pneumonia | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Antimicrobial Resistance & Infection Control](https://link.springer.com/collections/bgbhjabeba)**<br><em>Deadline: June 25, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [amr-aspergillus-fumigatus](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-aspergillus-fumigatus) | Azole resistance in *A. fumigatus* | [MSGERC Biennial](https://msgerc.org/2026-biennial-meeting/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Immunology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddhfibjigd)**<br><em>Deadline: June 26, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [amr-candida-auris](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-candida-auris) | Antifungal resistance in *C. auris* | [IMARI Annual](https://imari.org); [MSGERC Biennial](https://msgerc.org/2026-biennial-meeting/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Immunology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddhfibjigd)**<br><em>Deadline: June 26, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [amr-lomentospora-prolificans](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-lomentospora-prolificans) | Antifungal resistance in *L. prolificans* | [MSGERC Biennial](https://msgerc.org/2026-biennial-meeting/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Immunology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddhfibjigd)**<br><em>Deadline: June 26, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [amr-env-food](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-env-food) | Antimicrobial resistance in the food chain | [CSIRO AMR Summit](https://www.csiro.au/en/about/challenges-missions/antimicrobial-resistance/amr-summit)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/bbeihchhgf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 08, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [mgx-virome](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-virome) | Gut virome characterization | [ASV Annual](https://www.asv.org/annual-meeting); [ESCV Annual](https://escv.eu/calendar-events/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Biofilms and Microbiomes](https://www.nature.com/npjbiofilms/calls-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: July 15, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [amr-mycobacterium-tuberculosis](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-mycobacterium-tuberculosis) | MDR-TB genomics | TBD<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Microbiology](https://link.springer.com/collections/bajaefecgf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 16, 2026</em> | The Lancet Infectious Diseases |
| [amr-clostridioides-difficile](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-clostridioides-difficile) | Antimicrobial resistance in *C. difficile* | [Anaerobe Biennial](http://www.anaerobe.org/2026/); [9th International *C. difficile* Symposium (ICDS)](https://www.icds.si/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/ffbaaggicb)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [amr-staphylococcus-aureus](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-staphylococcus-aureus) | MRSA resistance mechanisms | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/); [ESCMID Annual](https://www.escmid.org/congress-events/escmid-global/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/fjheihhice)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [tx-staph-bacteremia](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-staph-bacteremia) | Treatment of *Staphylococcal bacteremia* | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/fjheihhice)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [tx-uuti](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-uuti) | Treatment of uncomplicated urinary tract infections | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/aiffadagdf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [amr-env-water](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-env-water) | Antimicrobial resistance in wastewater surveillance | [CSIRO AMR Summit](https://www.csiro.au/en/about/challenges-missions/antimicrobial-resistance/amr-summit)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/bjgbhdgcbf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 28, 2026</em> | Environmental Science & Technology |
| [DOOR-STEP](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/DOOR-STEP) | Desirability of Outcome Ranking with Stratified Treatment Effect Profiling | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Medical Research Methodology](https://link.springer.com/collections/hgihdahcfj)**<br><em>Deadline: July 30, 2026</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [DigitalTwin-Society-Health](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/DigitalTwin-Society-Health) | Digital twin of society's health for implementation science | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Implementation Science](https://implementationscience.biomedcentral.com/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Medicine |
| [PharmacyEducation](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/PharmacyEducation) | National trends in pharmacy education outcomes | [AACP Annual](https://www.aacp.org/events/annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Academic Medicine](https://journals.lww.com/academicmedicine/pages/default.aspx)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | American Journal of Pharmaceutical Education |
| [SpaceTime](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/SpaceTime) | Spatiotemporal model of receptors, enzymes, and pharmacology | [IUPHAR Annual](https://www.iuphar.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Molecular Pharmacology](https://molpharm.aspetjournals.org/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Reviews Drug Discovery |
| [amr-hiv](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-hiv) | HIV drug resistance | [CROI Annual](https://www.croiconference.org/); [ASV Annual](https://www.asv.org/annual-meeting); [ESCV Annual](https://escv.eu/calendar-events/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Microbiology](https://www.nature.com/nmicrobiol/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | The Lancet HIV |
| [amr-neisseria-gonorrhoeae](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-neisseria-gonorrhoeae) | AMR in *N. gonorrhoeae* | [IMARI Annual](https://imari.org); [CSIRO AMR Summit](https://www.csiro.au/en/about/challenges-missions/antimicrobial-resistance/amr-summit)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/bjgbhdgcbf)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | The Lancet Infectious Diseases |
| [biophysics-proteins-as-complex-machines-of-physics](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/biophysics-proteins-as-complex-machines-of-physics) | Biophysical analysis of protein machinery | [Biophysical Society Annual](https://www.biophysics.org/upcoming-annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Biophysical Journal](https://www.cell.com/biophysj/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Structural & Molecular Biology |
| [clostridioides_atlas](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/clostridioides_atlas) | Atlas of *C. difficile* phylogeography, AMR, and host-microbe interactions | [Houston *C diff* & Microbiome Conference](https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/); [9th International *C. difficile* Symposium (ICDS)](https://www.icds.si/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Microbiome](https://link.springer.com/collections/fbfahacdhi)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [cost-amr](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/cost-amr) | Economic burden of antimicrobial resistance | [Global AMR Innovators' Conference (GAMRIC)](https://www.gamric.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Clinical Infectious Diseases](https://academic.oup.com/idsa/pages/calls-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: Ongoing</em> | The Lancet Infectious Diseases |
| [epi-hbv](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/epi-hbv) | Requirements of HBV elimination in the United States | [AASLD Annual](https://www.aasld.org/the-liver-meeting)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[The Lancet Infectious Diseases](https://www.thelancet.com/journals/laninf/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Hepatology |
| [mgx-cap](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-cap) | Pulmonary metagenomics of community-acquired pneumonia | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[The Lancet Infectious Diseases](https://www.thelancet.com/journals/laninf/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [mgx-cdi-vre](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-cdi-vre) | C. difficile and VRE co-colonization | [Houston *C diff* & Microbiome Conference](https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/); [TMC AMR](https://www.tmc.edu/events/); [9th International *C. difficile* Symposium (ICDS)](https://www.icds.si/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Gut Microbes](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/kgmi20)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Microbiology |
| [mgx-mbx-colorectal-cancer](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-colorectal-cancer) | Microbiome and metabolome in colorectal cancer | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Cell Host & Microbe](https://www.cell.com/cell-host-microbe/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Medicine |
| [pcol-biofilm-rifamycins](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/pcol-biofilm-rifamycins) | Pharmacology of RNAP-targeting rifamycins on biofilms | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[mBio](https://journals.asm.org/asm-calls-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: Ongoing</em> | Antimicrobial Agents and Chemotherapy |
| [pcol-vcddmde-hbv](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/pcol-vcddmde-hbv) | Pharmacology of DdmDE degradation of HBV cccDNA | [AASLD Annual](https://www.aasld.org/the-liver-meeting)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Journal of Virology](https://journals.asm.org/journal/jvi)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Hepatology |
| [pharm-comm-ai](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/pharm-comm-ai) | Interactive AI module for pharmacy student communication training | [AACP Annual](https://www.aacp.org/events/annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Digital Medicine](https://www.nature.com/collections/hcdeibadid)**<br><em>Deadline: June 03, 2026</em> | Nature Medicine |
| [phys-hiv-lenacapavir](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/phys-hiv-lenacapavir) | Structure and physical properties of HIV-1 capsid hyperstabilization by lenacapavir | [CROI Annual](https://www.croiconference.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Journal of Virology](https://journals.asm.org/journal/jvi)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Structural & Molecular Biology |
| [roi-cdi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/roi-cdi) | Return on investment analysis for CDI interventions | [9th International *C. difficile* Symposium (ICDS)](https://www.icds.si/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Value in Health](https://www.journals.elsevier.com/value-in-health)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
| [roi-pipeline-antimicrobial](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/roi-pipeline-antimicrobial) | ROI analysis for antimicrobial drug development | [ISPOR Annual](https://www.ispor.org/conferences-education)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Pharmacoeconomics](https://link.springer.com/journal/40273)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Value in Health |
| [structure-function-pharmacology](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/structure-function-pharmacology) | Structure-function relationships in pharmacology | [IUPHAR Annual](https://www.iuphar.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Molecular Pharmacology](https://molpharm.aspetjournals.org/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Nature Reviews Drug Discovery |
| [tx-cdi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-cdi) | Treatment of *C. difficile* infection | [9th International *C. difficile* Symposium (ICDS)](https://www.icds.si/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Gut Microbes](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/kgmi20)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | Clinical Infectious Diseases |
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const table = document.querySelector('#active-projects-table-wrapper table');
  if (!table) {
    console.warn('Current Active Projects sync skipped: missing #active-projects-table-wrapper table.');
    return;
  }

  const INDEX_SOURCE_PATH = 'index.html';
  const CALL_DATA_ELEMENT_ID = 'research-index-call-for-papers-project-data';
  const CONFERENCE_DATA_ELEMENT_ID = 'research-index-conference-project-data';
  const normalizeUrl = (url) => (url || '').replace(/\/+$/, '');
  const indexUrl = new URL(INDEX_SOURCE_PATH, window.location.href);
  const tableBody = table.querySelector('tbody');
  const metadataByProject = new Map();

  if (tableBody) {
    Array.from(tableBody.rows).forEach((row, index) => {
      const projectLink = row.cells[0] && row.cells[0].querySelector('a');
      if (!projectLink) {
        return;
      }

      metadataByProject.set(normalizeUrl(projectLink.getAttribute('href')), {
        order: index,
        name: projectLink.textContent.trim(),
        question: row.cells[1] ? row.cells[1].textContent.trim() : '',
        bigJournal: row.cells[4] ? row.cells[4].textContent.trim() : '',
      });
    });
  }

  const getOrCreateProject = (projectsByUrl, projectUrl) => {
    const normalizedUrl = normalizeUrl(projectUrl);
    if (!projectsByUrl.has(normalizedUrl)) {
      const metadata = metadataByProject.get(normalizedUrl);
      let fallbackSlug = normalizedUrl;
      try {
        fallbackSlug = new URL(normalizedUrl).pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean).pop() || normalizedUrl;
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn(`Current Active Projects sync could not parse fallback project name from ${normalizedUrl}.`, error);
      }
      if (!metadata) {
        console.warn(`Current Active Projects sync is using fallback metadata for ${normalizedUrl}.`);
      }
      projectsByUrl.set(normalizedUrl, {
        url: normalizedUrl,
        name: metadata?.name || `Uncataloged: ${fallbackSlug}`,
        question: metadata?.question || '',
        bigJournal: metadata?.bigJournal || '',
        order: metadata?.order ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
        conferences: [],
        calls: [],
        conferenceKeys: new Set(),
        callKeys: new Set(),
      });
    }
    return projectsByUrl.get(normalizedUrl);
  };

  const createLink = (href, text) => {
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = href;
    link.textContent = text;
    return link;
  };

  const appendConferenceCellContent = (cell, conferences) => {
    if (!conferences.length) {
      cell.textContent = 'TBD';
      cell.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
      const em = document.createElement('em');
      em.textContent = 'Abstract: TBD';
      cell.appendChild(em);
      return;
    }

    conferences.forEach((conference, index) => {
      if (index > 0) {
        cell.append('; ');
      }
      cell.appendChild(createLink(conference.url, conference.name));
    });

    cell.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
    const allTbd = conferences.every((conference) => conference.abstractDisplay === 'TBD');

    const em = document.createElement('em');
    if (allTbd) {
      em.textContent = 'Abstract: TBD';
    } else if (conferences.length === 1) {
      em.textContent = `Abstract: ${conferences[0].abstractDisplay}`;
    } else {
      em.textContent = `Abstracts: ${conferences.map((conference) => `${conference.name} — ${conference.abstractDisplay}`).join('; ')}`;
    }
    cell.appendChild(em);
  };

  const appendCallCellContent = (cell, calls) => {
    if (!calls.length) {
      cell.textContent = '—';
      return;
    }

    calls.forEach((call, index) => {
      const callWrapper = document.createElement('div');
      if (index > 0) {
        callWrapper.style.marginTop = '8px';
      }

      const strong = document.createElement('strong');
      strong.appendChild(createLink(call.website, call.journal));
      callWrapper.appendChild(strong);
      callWrapper.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));

      const em = document.createElement('em');
      em.textContent = `Deadline: ${call.displayDate}`;
      callWrapper.appendChild(em);

      cell.appendChild(callWrapper);
    });
  };

  const rebuildActiveProjectsTable = (conferenceData, callData) => {
    if (!tableBody) {
      return;
    }

    const projectsByUrl = new Map();

    conferenceData.forEach((conference) => {
      (conference.projects || []).forEach((projectUrl) => {
        const project = getOrCreateProject(projectsByUrl, projectUrl);
        const conferenceKey = `${conference.name}|${conference.url}`;
        if (!project.conferenceKeys.has(conferenceKey)) {
          project.conferenceKeys.add(conferenceKey);
          project.conferences.push({
            name: conference.name,
            url: conference.url,
            abstractDisplay: conference.abstract_display || 'TBD',
          });
        }
      });
    });

    callData.forEach((call) => {
      (call.projects || []).forEach((projectUrl) => {
        const project = getOrCreateProject(projectsByUrl, projectUrl);
        const callKey = `${call.journal}|${call.website}|${call.display_date}`;
        if (!project.callKeys.has(callKey)) {
          project.callKeys.add(callKey);
          project.calls.push({
            journal: call.journal,
            website: call.website,
            displayDate: call.display_date,
          });
        }
      });
    });

    const rows = Array.from(projectsByUrl.values())
      .sort((left, right) => {
        if (left.order !== right.order) {
          return left.order - right.order;
        }
        return left.name.localeCompare(right.name);
      });

    if (!rows.length) {
      console.warn('Current Active Projects sync from the Research page data produced no rows; keeping existing table.');
      return;
    }

    const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();

    rows.forEach((project) => {
      const row = document.createElement('tr');

      const projectCell = document.createElement('td');
      projectCell.appendChild(createLink(project.url, project.name));
      row.appendChild(projectCell);

      const questionCell = document.createElement('td');
      questionCell.textContent = project.question || '—';
      row.appendChild(questionCell);

      const conferenceCell = document.createElement('td');
      appendConferenceCellContent(conferenceCell, project.conferences);
      row.appendChild(conferenceCell);

      const callCell = document.createElement('td');
      appendCallCellContent(callCell, project.calls);
      row.appendChild(callCell);

      const journalCell = document.createElement('td');
      journalCell.textContent = project.bigJournal || '—';
      row.appendChild(journalCell);

      fragment.appendChild(row);
    });

    tableBody.replaceChildren(fragment);
  };

  fetch(indexUrl.toString())
    .then((response) => {
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Unable to load ${indexUrl.pathname} (${response.status})`);
      }
      return response.text();
    })
    .then((html) => {
      const indexDocument = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
      const conferenceDataElement = indexDocument.getElementById(CONFERENCE_DATA_ELEMENT_ID);
      const callDataElement = indexDocument.getElementById(CALL_DATA_ELEMENT_ID);
      if (!conferenceDataElement || !callDataElement) {
        throw new Error(`Missing project sync data in ${indexUrl.pathname}.`);
      }
      rebuildActiveProjectsTable(
        JSON.parse(conferenceDataElement.textContent),
        JSON.parse(callDataElement.textContent),
      );
    })
    .catch((error) => {
      console.warn('Current Active Projects sync from the Research page data failed:', error);
    });
});
</script>
```

### Grants

For more information about NIH funding opportunities, visit [NIH Funding Opportunities](https://grants.nih.gov/funding/explore-nih-opportunities).

- [Large Research Projects for Combating Antibiotic-Resistant Bacteria (CARB) (R01)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/334655) — AHRQ | Close: Oct 30, 2026
- [AHRQ Mentored Clinical Scientist Research Career Development Award (K08)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/ef9627c9-6dd2-4dc8-a415-ab06d29093ca) — AHRQ | Close: Feb 12, 2027
- [Medical Scientist Training Program (MSTP) (T32)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/15a7a4eb-9a7e-4737-a6e1-7c3a45194e3d) — NIH/NIGMS | Close: Jan 25, 2027
- [NARMS Cooperative Agreement Program to Strengthen Antibiotic Resistance Surveillance in Retail Food Specimens](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/14c2b96f-e210-4856-8901-f8278996198a) — FDA | Close: Apr 1, 2027
- [NIH Small Research Grant Program (Parent R03 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/357805) — NIH | Close: Jan 8, 2028
- [Investigator Initiated Innovation in Computational Genomics and Data Science (R01 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/357194) — NIH/NHGRI & NLM | Close: Sep 8, 2027
- [NEI Research Grant for Vision-Related Secondary Data Analysis (R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/4767321c-d902-4914-b62d-48bd9453cbd1) — NIH/NEI | Close: Oct 16, 2027
- [Accelerating the Pace of Substance Use Research Using Existing Data (R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/357545) — NIH/NIDA | Close: Dec 3, 2027
- [Economic and Modeling Analyses to Support Immunization Policy and Programs](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/5f66747e-3c8a-4920-a9f4-0f398a5c91ce) — CDC | Close: TBD
- [Summer Institute for Research Education in Biostatistics and Data Science](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/bfc61fde-b048-4f6f-8a14-15e6d2abdc30) — NIH/NHLBI | Close: Jul 1, 2026

### Contributing to Projects

Lab members and collaborators can contribute to projects by following these steps:

1. **Start a New Project**:
   - Fork or use the [Template Project Repository](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/template)
   - Set up project structure with README, data directories, and analysis scripts
   - Define contributor roles using [CRediT taxonomy](https://credit.niso.org/)

2. **Link to Opportunities**:
   - Add the project to relevant [conference](conferences.qmd) entries
   - Associate with [calls for papers](callforpapers.qmd) that match the research topic
   - The project table above will sync its target venues from the Research page data

3. **Track Progress**:
   - Use GitHub Issues for tasks, bugs, and feature requests
   - Maintain a GitHub Project Board for milestone tracking
   - Document progress in regular commits with meaningful messages

4. **Collaborate Effectively**:
   - Submit pull requests for code review
   - Participate in discussions on issues and PRs
   - Follow lab coding standards and documentation guidelines

5. **Prepare for Submission**:
   - Ensure all analyses are reproducible
   - Complete documentation and data availability statements
   - Prepare manuscripts using lab templates

### Project Resources

- **GitHub Organization**: [McPherson Lab on GitHub](https://github.com/McPhersonLab)
- **CRediT Roles**: [Contributor Roles Taxonomy](https://credit.niso.org/)
- **Template Repository**: [Project Template](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/template)

### Project Categories and Prefixes

Our projects use standardized naming conventions:

- `amr-*`: Antimicrobial resistance studies
- `mgx-*`: Metagenomics and microbiome research
- `tx-*`: Treatment and therapeutic interventions
- `ai-*`: Artificial intelligence and machine learning
- `cost-*` or `roi-*`: Health economics and cost-effectiveness
- `biophysics-*`: Structural biology and biophysics
- `structure-function-*`: Pharmacology and drug design

---

**Questions or want to join a project?** Contact [jacobmcpherson@utexas.edu](mailto:jacobmcpherson@utexas.edu)

**Browse all repositories**: [https://github.com/McPhersonLab](https://github.com/McPhersonLab)
___BEGIN___COMMAND_DONE_MARKER___0
